project.name: SharkBay
project.currentFocus: Runtime-derived terminal tab titles are complete.

recentDecisions.decision: Completed t-023-terminal-title-strategy with terminal tabs deriving titles from project-relative cwd or foreground occupying commands.
Open t-023-terminal-title-strategy to make terminal tabs show project-relative cwd by default and foreground occupying commands when more useful.
Completed t-022-runner-task-registration with task-first runner protocol rules and SharkBay diagnostics for missing, inactive, or mismatched runner tasks.
Open t-022-runner-task-registration to prevent runner-only work from staying invisible when task queue/state registration is missing.
Completed t-021-harness-behavioral-discipline with Behavioral Discipline rules applied to SharkBay, setup templates, AIBF, and AIGF.
Open t-021-harness-behavioral-discipline to add ambiguity, simplicity, traceability, and verification-mapping rules to SharkBay, templates, AIBF, and AIGF.
Initialized SharkBay from the project seed in init.md.
Orient SharkBay as a macOS local app rather than a browser-only web app.
Keep Codex edits scoped to the current project workspace; SharkBay will later manage only directories configured inside the app.
Initialized git in the repository on branch main.
Recorded intended GitHub repository URL git@github.com:SharkUI/sharkbay.git.
Configured git remote origin as git@github.com:SharkUI/sharkbay.git.
Accepted Electron + React + TypeScript + Vite as the default MVP stack for the macOS local app.
recentDecisions.source: controller default after user asked to continue

recentDecisions.decision: Completed the MVP design artifact and advanced task t-001-sharkbay-mvp-spec to design_review.
Moved task t-001-sharkbay-mvp-spec to design_revision because design review found one major issue.
Revised the MVP design to address safe harness JSON writes, URL persistence, and safety verification findings.
Second design review passed with blocker=0 and major=0; advanced task t-001-sharkbay-mvp-spec to contract.
Implementation contract passed controller gate; advanced task t-001-sharkbay-mvp-spec to coding.
Completed the first MVP coding slice and recorded command evidence; advanced task t-001-sharkbay-mvp-spec to code_review.
Moved task t-001-sharkbay-mvp-spec to code_revision because code review found one blocker and two major findings.
Revised configured-root authority, symlink read/create safety, and URL mirror mismatch findings; returned task t-001-sharkbay-mvp-spec to code_review.
Second code review passed with blocker=0 and major=0; advanced task t-001-sharkbay-mvp-spec to verification.
Verification passed for the first SharkBay MVP coding slice; advanced task t-001-sharkbay-mvp-spec to docs_update.
Documentation updated and task t-001-sharkbay-mvp-spec marked done.
Created task t-002-self-hosting-ux and advanced it from spec to design.
Completed the t-002 self-hosting workflow design and advanced it to design_review.
Moved t-002-self-hosting-ux to design_revision after design review found two major issues.
Revised t-002 design and returned it to design_review.
Design review passed for t-002-self-hosting-ux; contract written and coding opened.
Implemented t-002 self-hosting workflow polish and advanced it to code_review.
Moved t-002-self-hosting-ux to code_revision after code review found a scan metadata issue.
Revised t-002 scan metadata IPC and self-host marker test coverage; returned to code_review.
Second code review passed for t-002-self-hosting-ux; advanced to verification.
Verification passed for t-002-self-hosting-ux; advanced to docs_update.
Documentation updated and task t-002-self-hosting-ux marked done.
Created task t-003-dogfood-self-hosting-flow for a real self-hosting dogfood pass and opened coding.
Implemented t-003 dogfood fixes and advanced the task to code_review.
Moved t-003-dogfood-self-hosting-flow to code_revision after review found one major and one minor issue.
Addressed t-003 code review findings and returned the task to code_review.
Second code review passed for t-003-dogfood-self-hosting-flow; advanced to verification.
Verification and docs update passed for t-003-dogfood-self-hosting-flow; marked done.
Created t-004-user-centered-project-workbench as a UI-first project workbench redesign task.
Added git checkpoint discipline to the controller protocol so each phase or coherent coding slice is committed.
Completed t-004-user-centered-project-workbench with a project-first UI, Settings-based setup controls, and verified checks.
Opened t-005-root-child-discovery to list ordinary root child folders and show managed/not-setup status.
Designed t-005 around a read-only ProjectCandidate layer alongside existing managed ProjectSummary scanning.
Design review passed for t-005-root-child-discovery and coding opened with an additive candidates contract.
Completed t-005-root-child-discovery with read-only root child candidates and managed/not-setup project rows.
Inserted t-006-autonomous-ux-polish before Ripple setup and moved the write-safety task to t-007-ripple-setup-flow.
Completed t-006-autonomous-ux-polish with a self-reviewed UX cleanup of project rows, not-setup detail, and queue/detail signals.
Queued t-008-project-authored-url-metadata so project agents can later maintain local, test, and deploy URLs from project documents after setup or deployment.
Opened t-007-ripple-setup-flow as the active task.
Advanced t-007-ripple-setup-flow to coding after spec, design review, and contract passed.
Implemented t-007-ripple-setup-flow with confirmed existing-directory setup and no-overwrite template preflight.
Completed t-007-ripple-setup-flow and left t-008-project-authored-url-metadata as the next backlog task.
Decision and Git history surfaces should show the latest five records in project detail, with full history opened inside the right detail column.
History timestamps should be shown as readable relative times on each item, and backlog tasks must remain visible in the project detail queue.
Expanded t-008 from URL metadata to project-authored developer metadata that keeps SharkBay project details read-only where possible.
Use `.agent/development.json` for stable project-authored developer metadata and keep SharkBay's first display read-only and summary-focused.
Implemented the first read-only developer metadata slice with optional `.agent/development.json` reading and a compact Project Info summary.
Completed t-008-project-authored-url-metadata with verification passing.
Treat Needs Action as a human intervention surface rather than a dirty-worktree or generic phase list.
Completed t-009-human-intervention-policy after committing the implementation checkpoint first.
Opened t-010-agent-onboarding-instructions to define setup-time agent entrypoint instructions for Ripple projects.
Synchronized SharkBay repository identity and git origin to git@github.com:SharkUI/SharkBay.git after the GitHub repository casing changed.
Scrubbed public working-tree references to private local filesystem paths before publishing the repository.
Advanced t-010-agent-onboarding-instructions from intake to spec with a Codex-first AGENTS.md onboarding policy and no-overwrite setup behavior.
Advanced t-010-agent-onboarding-instructions from spec to design with a root AGENTS.md template and no-overwrite setup behavior.
Design review passed for t-010-agent-onboarding-instructions with blocker=0 and major=0.
Contract passed for t-010-agent-onboarding-instructions; coding may begin because dependency t-009-human-intervention-policy is done.
Opened coding for t-010-agent-onboarding-instructions after confirming dependency t-009-human-intervention-policy is done.
Implemented the t-010 AGENTS.md template and focused setup/prompt tests; required checks passed except dev startup is blocked by occupied port 5173 with an existing server returning HTTP 200.
Code review passed for t-010-agent-onboarding-instructions with blocker=0 and major=0; one minor status-note issue was fixed.
Verification passed for t-010-agent-onboarding-instructions; dev startup is blocked by occupied port 5173, and the existing server returns HTTP 200.
Documentation updated and task t-010-agent-onboarding-instructions marked done.
Opened t-011-runner-lifecycle-heartbeat and designed a cooperative runner lease and heartbeat model separate from harness phase.
Design review passed for t-011-runner-lifecycle-heartbeat with blocker=0 and major=0; contract may begin.
Contract passed for t-011-runner-lifecycle-heartbeat; coding may begin on the first read-only runner lifecycle slice.
Code review passed for t-011-runner-lifecycle-heartbeat after implementing runner metadata reading, handoff semantics, and protocol docs.
Verification passed for t-011-runner-lifecycle-heartbeat; runner lifecycle is now read from cooperative metadata instead of inferred from task phase.
Completed t-011-runner-lifecycle-heartbeat with separate runner lifecycle metadata, Needs Action semantics, and protocol guidance.
Fixed task list visibility by matching SharkBay's queue reader to section-specific harness queue rules and adding read-only task directory fallback rows.
Moved task artifacts out of the default project overview and added a full-column task drilldown from the Tasks list.
Open SharkBay Settings from the macOS application menu instead of relying on an in-panel settings button.
Removed the left project panel's search, phase, Dirty, Blocked, refresh, and Settings controls.
Keep DashboardView mounted while Settings is open so terminal spaces, tabs, and xterm instances persist across Settings navigation.
Open t-020-right-detail-card-tabs to convert the right detail column into card-style tabs for Tasks, Decisions, Git, and Info, with handoff remaining inside Tasks.
Completed t-020-right-detail-card-tabs with card-style right detail tabs and Handoff scoped to Tasks.
Repaired right detail card tabs to preserve tab-local state across switches and added explicit tab accessibility links and keyboard navigation.
Flattened right detail tab content: current task is the first task row, Decisions and Git show complete lists directly, repository facts moved to Git, and Info no longer shows Track URLs.
